# Pull request

## Type

- [ ] New content (article, module, code lab)
- [ ] Edit / fix (typo, link, clarity)
- [ ] Tooling / CI / repo config

## Description

What does this PR do? Link any related issue (e.g. "Closes #123").

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/gorusys/indigo-hub/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] For content: style and terminology follow the project style guide; no financial advice without disclaimers.
- [ ] For content: facts are consistent with [Indigo docs](https://docs.indigoprotocol.io/) or cited.
- [ ] `mkdocs build` passes locally (if docs were changed).

## Reviewer notes (optional)

Anything the reviewer should pay attention to?
